name: Confluence Cloud
description: Confluence Cloud wiki: search pages, CRUD pages, comments, labels, spaces. Shares Atlassian credentials with Jira skill.

credentials_required.label: Atlassian Email
credentials_required.hint: Your Atlassian account email (same across Jira + Confluence).

credentials_required.label: Atlassian API Token
credentials_required.hint: Create at id.atlassian.com/manage-profile/security/api-tokens. NOTE: Atlassian enforces token expiry (1-365 days) — you will need to rotate it manually.

credentials_required.label: Atlassian Site URL
credentials_required.hint: Your site subdomain, e.g. 'your-org.atlassian.net' (without https:// prefix).

tools.name: list_spaces
tools.description: List all Confluence spaces (id, key, name, type)

tools.name: list_pages_in_space
tools.description: List pages in a space by space id (reliable fallback when CQL search is not indexed yet)

tools.name: search_pages
tools.description: Full-text search across pages using CQL (e.g. 'text ~ "onboarding"', 'space = MARKETING AND text ~ "launch"')

tools.name: get_page
tools.description: Get page by id — full body (storage format), version, space

tools.name: get_page_by_title
tools.description: Find a page by exact title (optionally scoped to a space-id). Note: exact ASCII titles work reliably; titles with em-dashes or diacritics may not match.

tools.name: list_children
tools.description: List direct child pages of a parent page

tools.name: create_page
tools.description: Create a new page with space-id, title, body (storage format HTML), optional parent-id

tools.name: add_comment_to_page
tools.description: Add a footer comment to a page

tools.name: list_comments_on_page
tools.description: List footer comments on a page

tools.name: add_label_to_page
tools.description: Add a label to a page (for categorization and label-based search)

tools.name: list_labels_on_page
tools.description: List all labels on a page

author: freddy-schuetz
